name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: Detroit, MI's SAM Check Cashing Machine on Schaefer Highway offers fast check cashing with extended daily hours and convenient access.
description_long:
SAM Check Cashing Machine is located at 14424 Schaefer Highway in Detroit, Michigan, operating as a standalone check-cashing facility in the city's east side. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM, and Sunday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, making it convenient for Detroit residents who need quick financial services outside typical banking hours.

This Detroit-area location specializes in check cashing, offering same-day processing for personal and business checks. You can reach them at +1 313-934-0325 to verify hours, discuss check limits, or ask about any additional services. The straightforward approach means you get cash for your check quickly without the formalities of traditional banking.

If you're a Detroit resident needing quick cash for a check, bring a valid government-issued ID and your endorsed check. SAM Check Cashing Machine handles the transaction efficiently so you can get back to your day.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 9 PM (Monday-Friday) accommodate working customers unable to access traditional banks
Open Sundays 8 AM-7 PM, providing weekend access when most banks are closed
Convenient Detroit location on Seven Mile W with phone contact available
Early opening at 8 AM daily supports customers needing same-day cash access before work
Consistent operating schedule across 6 days per week (Monday-Saturday 8 AM-9 PM) for reliable access
cons: No specific fee structure, APR, or pricing information disclosed on available sources
Limited online presence and no detailed service menu published on searchable platforms
Only one verified location identified, limiting accessibility for broader Detroit area
No information on additional services beyond basic check cashing (money orders, wire transfers mentioned in category but not confirmed for this location)
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification available in provided data
best_for: Detroit-area residents without bank accounts needing immediate check conversion to cash
Workers with non-traditional schedules requiring evening or Sunday financial services
Customers seeking neighborhood-based check-cashing without traveling to bank branches
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best for Detroit residents without traditional bank accounts who need same-day check conversion with convenient evening or weekend hours. The primary caveat is the absence of publicly available pricing, fee structures, and detailed service information, making it difficult to assess competitiveness or total cost of use before visiting in person.
meta_description: SAM Check Cashing Machine at 14424 Schaefer Highway, Detroit, MI. Fast check cashing with extended hours daily.
